summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected, and no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is planned because this job disables those paths. Open focused PRs are kept open or routed to exact human-review blockers; the linked security-sensitive ref is quarantined only for central security handling.
